item.title: Reagan Economist Sounds the Alarm: AI Is ‘Overhyped and Potentially Dangerous’
item.description: Market expert Steve Hanke predicts AI bubble will burst if Big Tech fails to meet its “spectacular” revenue forecasts.

item.title: Jeff Bezos Reveals the Brutal Fundraising Fight Behind Amazon’s Origin Story
item.description: The Amazon founder reflected on a mistake he made at the very beginning.

item.title: OpenAI’s Leadership Drama Reveals 5 Hard Truths About Running a High-Growth Company
item.description: When innovation moves at warp speed, leadership gets stress-tested in ways most companies never experience.

item.title: 3 Ways to Build Rapport and Understanding Before You Negotiate
item.description: When you learn how to connect with people, you will be able to better understand, collaborate, and negotiate with them.

item.title: AI Can Talk You Out of Being Right. New Research Shows How
item.description: When you challenge generative AI, it may not just correct itself but persuade you to override your expertise.
